name: @devco/agent-skills
description: Lightweight, context-efficient Claude Code plugin for Java Spring backend — hook-bootstrapped skills, 3-tier organization, lazy loading
author: TaiPT

scripts.test:json: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/plugin.json','utf8')); console.log('✓ plugin.json valid')" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json','utf8')); console.log('✓ marketplace.json valid')" && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('hooks/hooks.json','utf8')); console.log('✓ hooks.json valid')" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');['productivity/fetch.json','productivity/exa-search.json','productivity/filesystem.json','productivity/notion.json','core/postgres.json','core/docker.json','core/github.json','core/gradle.json','optional/redis.json','optional/kafka.json','optional/playwright.json'].forEach(f=>{JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join('mcp-configs',f),'utf8'));console.log('✓ mcp-configs/'+f+' valid')})" && echo 'All JSON validations passed ✓'
scripts.postinstall: echo '' && echo '🚀 @devco/agent-skills installed!' && echo '' && echo 'Claude Code plugin for Java/Spring WebFlux reactive microservices.' && echo '' && echo 'Install via marketplace:' && echo '  /plugin marketplace add taipt1504/agent-skills' && echo '  /plugin install agent-skills' && echo '' && echo 'Or register manually:' && echo '  claude plugin install ./node_modules/@devco/agent-skills' && echo ''
